name: Menki

skills.name: Dream-eating
skills.description: Gains Mass when using skills. Mass increases his Physical Attack, Physical Defense, and Magical Defense.

skills.name: Lingering Dream
skills.description: Gains Mass and a shield while damaging enemies in range. Basic Attack hits reduce this skill's cooldown.

skills.name: Dream Bubble
skills.description: Launches a bubble in the target direction, then pulls it back. He does thistwice. The bubble damages and slows enemies hit.The bubble can be launched again as a bomb in the target direction, damaging enemies.

skills.name: Dream Roam
skills.description: Flies in a circle, dealing magical damage to enemies in his path and gaining. Mass all the while. When he stops flying, he launches and damages nearby enemies.

tips: Menki is a Medium Mage (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.7% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Giant's Grip → Boots of Resistance → Shadow Ripper → Blazing Cape → Pure Sky → Blood Rage.
Run Fate for stats that match Menki's Mage kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Lingering Dream → Dream Bubble → Dream Roam → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Menki excels into Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi without team peel.
Menki sits at Tier B globally (51.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Menki good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Menki is Tier B Mage with 51.7% win rate, 0.2% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Menki build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Giant's Grip, Boots of Resistance, Shadow Ripper, Blazing Cape, Pure Sky, Blood Rage. Run Fate arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Menki?
faqs.answer: Pick Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi into Menki. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Menki completes core items. Menki struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Menki counter?
faqs.answer: Menki is strong into Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Menki when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Menki good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Menki sits at Tier B globally (51.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Menki play?
faqs.answer: Menki is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Fighter, Mage). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Menki?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Menki or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Menki vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Menki has +0.6% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Menki when you need Jungling identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Menki?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
